title: Gynecologic Cancers: Molecular Updates 2018.
author_string: Abdulfatah, Eman, Ahmed, Quratulain, Alosh, Baraa, Bandyopadhyay, Sudeshna, Bluth, Martin H et al.
abstract: Ovarian carcinoma continues to be a concern for woman and maintains significant morbidity and mortality. Emerging molecular markers are providing additional opportunities for effective diagnosis and prognosis of disease. An integrated clinicopathologic and molecular classification of gynecologic malignancies has the potential to refine the clinical risk prediction of patients with cancer and to provide more tailored treatment recommendations.
